hypothesis: LGB_WEEKLY_CYCLICAL_ENHANCED: Enhance weekly cyclical features by adding more sophisticated day-of-week interactions and weekly pattern stability measures. Include cyclical encoding for day-of-week with sine/cosine transforms, weekly pattern deviations, day-of-week × price interactions, and weekly volatility measures. Add weekly momentum features that capture how sales patterns change from week to week for better short-term forecasting accuracy.
